programs.title: Silver Star
programs.desc: African American Billie (Troy Leigh-Anne Johnson) is twenty years old and a tomboy.He comes from a military family and is missing one eye.After serving her prison sentence, she discovers that her separated parents are facing eviction.He decides to prevent this at all costs.The woman decides to rob a bank, but the action ends in failure.As a result, the young criminal takes her client hostage.Pregnant Franny (Grace Van Dien) is eighteen years old and has a head open to crazy ideas.Together they escape and set off on an adventurous journey.At one point, Franny offers Billie an unexpected deal.

programs.title: Vinci 2
programs.desc: Cuma receives an offer to participate in a new heist.At first he refuses, but changes his mind when he learns that his old rival, Chudy, is planning a spectacular robbery in Krakow without his participation.

programs.title: In short
programs.desc: The year 2019, on the threshold of the pandemic.Single woman Ellen (Laura Tonke) spends New Year's Eve with her friends.No one knows that she is having an affair with Sebastian (Ronald Zehrfeld), Eva's (Antje Traue) husband.Rolf (Nicholas Ofczarek) and Dina (Pegah Ferydoni) make a perfect couple, unlike Mareike (Annette Frier) and Adam (Trystan Pütter).Maya (Katia Fellin) wants children, Natalie (Jasmin Shakeri) cannot decide.Max (Henning Flüsloh) comes into Ellen's life and he would love her if she let him.Years pass.The woman attends various types of celebrations, birthday parties and casual social gatherings.He learns about events in his friends' lives.The sense of community unites and allows everyone to return to everyday life with positive energy.Remake of the Danish film "A Long Story Briefly".

programs.title: Karate Kid: Legends
programs.desc: Li Fong's friend needs help.He decided to take part in a karate tournament, but his skills are insufficient.Teacher Han turns to the legendary Daniel LaRusso for help.

programs.title: Kingdom of Heaven
programs.desc: 12th century.The young blacksmith Balian (Orlando Bloom) loses his entire family in tragic circumstances.He begins to doubt the existence of God.Then he is visited by the crusader Godfrey of Ibelin (Liam Neeson), who turns out to be his father.He suggests his son learn knightly crafts.One day, Balian kills a priest in a fight.He must escape.Together with Godfrey, he sets off for Jerusalem.On the way, his father is killed by the bishop's men.Prudent King Baldwin IV (Edward Norton) and his advisor Tiberias (Jeremy Irons) strive for peaceful solutions.Thanks to them, there are no hostilities in Jerusalem.They even manage to reach a truce with the leader of the Muslims, Saladin (Ghassan Massoud).However, the ruler's conciliatory policy does not please some greedy and fanatical crusaders.Meanwhile, Balian falls in love with the king's sister, the already married princess Sibyl (Eva Green).The girl does not love her husband, Baron Guy de Lusignan (Marton Csokas).Soon the Crusaders start a war with the Muslims.

programs.title: Anaconda
programs.desc: Doug (Jack Black) and Griff (Paul Rudd) have been friends since childhood.They have always dreamed of making a remake of their favorite film, the horror film "Anaconda".When both buddies experience a midlife crisis, they decide not to wait any longer and set off together deep into the Amazon to start filming.The situation becomes more complicated when... a real giant anaconda appears on the film set, spreading chaos and destruction around.Despite the deadly threat, the friends decide to take advantage of the predator's presence.
